title: Marketplace Manager - Cleartrip - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Cleartrip - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cleartrip family as a Marketplace Manager in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cleartrip:
Cleartrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip!
